title: ⚠️ 工作流说明：小红书形象五连图（并发 5 次 edit）
description: 目标：生成小红书风格个人形象五连图（全套）。工作流 = 并发（或顺序）5 次 edit call，依次交付。5 张图视觉风格必须统一（同一背景色系/字体/排版语言）。若用户只要部分图（如只要色彩三连），按需取对应 prompt 即可。

workflow.execution: 并发（或顺序）5 次 gpt-image-2-edit，每次用原始参考图
workflow.reference_image: required（素颜自拍，正面，自然光，无滤镜）
workflow.delivery: 图1 → 图2 → 图3 → 图4 → 图5 依次交付
workflow.visual_consistency: 5 张必须共享：相同背景色调（从诊断季节推导）、相同字体体系、相同卡片圆角/间距语言
workflow.anti_template_rule: 【铁律】禁止任何默认暖调/奶茶/土黄色系。所有颜色（背景/色块/妆色/发色/穿搭）必须从诊断出的季节动态派生。
workflow.partial_mode: 若用户只要色彩三连 → 取图1/2/3；只要发型+五官 → 取图4/5；按需灵活组合

execution_steps: Step 1：确认用户已提供素颜参考图（正面，自然光，无滤镜，无重度妆容）
Step 2：确认用户要全套（5张）还是部分（色彩三连/发型五官等）
Step 3：并发（或顺序）调用对应 prompt + 参考图
season_system: 12型色彩季节：春(Bright/True/Light) / 夏(Light/True/Soft) / 秋(Soft/True/Dark) / 冬(Dark/True/Bright)
content: 此条目为工作流说明，不含可执行 prompt。

title: 【图1】诊断总览卡 / Color Diagnosis Overview
description: 三连图第一张。小红书风格信息卡：季节判定 + 色彩属性图 + 最佳色盘 + 关键词标签。背景色从诊断季节动态派生，禁止默认暖调。
content:
Using the uploaded reference photo as the subject, generate Image 1 of 3 for a Xiaohongshu (小红书) personal color analysis series.

## INTERNAL ANALYSIS (silent — outputs govern all design)
Analyze the subject's skin undertone (warm/cool/neutral), skin depth (light/medium/deep), skin chroma (bright/muted), hair color temperature, and eye color clarity.
Determine Personal Color Season using the 12-type Korean system:
  Spring: Bright Spring / True Spring / Light Spring
  Summer: Light Summer / True Summer / Soft Summer
  Autumn: Soft Autumn / True Autumn / Dark Autumn
  Winter: Dark Winter / True Winter / Bright Winter
From the diagnosed season, derive:
  - A primary background color (light, low-chroma, season-accurate)
  - An accent color family (used for headers/badges)
  - A palette of 8-10 best colors (season-accurate muted tones)
  ⚠️ STRICT RULE: Do NOT default to warm/beige/milk-tea tones. If season is Summer/Winter/Bright Spring, background must be cool or neutral. Warm tones only when season diagnosis explicitly calls for it.

## VISUAL STYLE (小红书 native — NOT Kinfolk minimalism)
- Layout: portrait 3:4, clean information card aesthetic
- Background: soft gradient or flat color derived from diagnosed season (cool/neutral/warm based on actual season)
- Cards: rounded corners (16-20px equivalent), soft drop shadow, generous padding
- Typography: Chinese primary, clean rounded sans-serif (like PingFang or Noto Sans); no serif typography
- Accent: season-accurate accent color for badges, pill tags, and color swatches
- Mood: warm-friendly-professional (小红书 vibe), NOT clinical or minimal
- Avoid: pure white background, harsh lines, academic/clinical layouts, English-dominant text

## LAYOUT (portrait 3:4)

── TOP HEADER ──
Top center: 「🎨 个人色彩诊断」as rounded pill tag in accent color
Below: Subject's face portrait — exact likeness from reference photo, soft studio lighting, rounded frame, centered
Below portrait: Large season name in Chinese + English subtitle
E.g.: 「柔和秋季型」/ Soft Autumn
Season description: 1-2 lines of Chinese text describing her natural vibe (e.g., 「自带温柔感，适合大地与秋日色调」)

── COLOR PROFILE BAR ──
Title: 「色彩属性」with icon
3 horizontal gradient bars with dot position indicators:
  • 色相冷暖 (UNDERTONE)：冷 ←——·——→ 暖
  • 明度深浅 (DEPTH)：浅 ←——·——→ 深
  • 彩度鲜浊 (CHROMA)：清 ←——·——→ 浊
Each bar label in Chinese, dot placed based on actual diagnosis

── BEST COLOR PALETTE ──
Title: 「你的专属色盘 ✨」
2 rows × 5 color circles (10 total), season-accurate palette
Each circle: filled with exact muted season-appropriate color
Below each circle: short Chinese color name (e.g., 「藕荷粉」「雾蓝」「暮栗棕」)

── KEYWORD TAGS ──
Title: 「风格关键词」
6-8 rounded pill tags in 2-3 rows, each with a Chinese style word
Examples for Soft Autumn: 「温柔系」「大地感」「秋日暖」「高级雾感」「自然系」「奶茶不是你」
Tag background: accent color, light opacity

── BOTTOM FOOTER ──
Small text: 「以上诊断基于12型色彩季节系统 · 图片由 AI 生成」
Style: muted gray, centered, small font

## QUALITY REQUIREMENTS
- Subject's exact face from reference photo, consistent with natural lighting
- All Chinese text correctly written, no garbled characters
- Color palette strictly follows season diagnosis — NO warm/beige defaults
- GPT Image 2, maximum quality, 3:4 portrait format
- This is Image 1 of 3 — establish the visual language that Images 2 & 3 will follow

title: 【图2】上身测试 + 穿搭落地 / Outfit & Color Wearing Test
description: 三连图第二张。展示 5-6 套穿搭上身效果（推荐 vs 避雷对比），颜色全部从季节诊断动态生成。小红书穿搭种草图风格。
content:
Using the uploaded reference photo as the subject, generate Image 2 of 3 for a Xiaohongshu (小红书) personal color analysis series.

## INTERNAL ANALYSIS (inherit from Image 1 logic)
Analyze and diagnose the same Personal Color Season as Image 1 (12-type Korean system). Use the season to determine:
  - RECOMMENDED color families: the palette that enhances her natural features
  - AVOID color families: colors that dull her skin or create dissonance
  ⚠️ STRICT RULE: Color choices must derive from the diagnosed season. Do NOT default to warm/beige/milk-tea for recommended colors unless season diagnosis requires it.

## VISUAL STYLE
- Same background color family as Image 1 (season-derived, consistent series look)
- Same rounded card aesthetic, same Chinese-primary typography
- 小红书 穿搭种草 vibe: styled, aspirational, lifestyle-forward
- Layout: portrait 3:4

## LAYOUT (portrait 3:4)

── HEADER ──
Pill tag: 「👗 上身测试」in accent color
Subheader: 「看看这些颜色上身效果怎么样？」(Chinese, friendly tone)

── RECOMMENDED OUTFITS SECTION ──
Title: 「✅ 这些颜色很适合你」
3-4 outfit panels in a grid (2×2 or 1+3 layout)
Each panel:
  • Subject wearing a styled outfit in a season-appropriate color
  • Outfit: modern Korean/Chinese casual-chic style (NOT business/formal)
  • Below panel: color name + brief Chinese note (e.g., 「暮粉 · 柔化轮廓感」)
Colors must be muted, season-accurate, varied (not all the same hue)

── AVOID SECTION ──
Title: 「❌ 这些颜色会让你显色气不对」
2 outfit panels side by side
Each panel:
  • Subject wearing an outfit in a clashing or undertone-mismatched color
  • Subtle ✗ overlay or label
  • Below: color name + brief note (e.g., 「荧光橙 · 抢色，显暗沉」)

── COLOR COMBO STRIP ──
Title: 「推荐配色组合 💡」
2-3 horizontal color combination strips, each showing 3 coordinating colors as circles
Label: e.g., 「雾蓝 + 米白 + 深栗」with style keyword below

── BOTTOM ──
Small muted footer: 「穿搭建议基于个人色彩季节诊断 · 实际效果因个体差异略有不同」

## QUALITY REQUIREMENTS
- Subject's exact face from reference photo on all styled outfit renderings
- Outfit colors strictly derived from season — NO warm defaults if season is cool
- At least 5 distinct outfit color tones shown across recommended + avoid sections
- Clothing style: contemporary, youthful, aspirational (Korean/Chinese fashion-forward)
- Chinese text correct and legible throughout
- GPT Image 2, maximum quality, 3:4 portrait format
- Visually consistent with Image 1 (same background tone, same card style)

title: 【图3】妆容 + 发色 + 配饰 / Makeup · Hair · Accessories
description: 三连图第三张。具体妆色色号（唇/眼/腮红）+ 发色推荐 + 配饰风格。所有颜色动态派生，给出可落地的参考色调描述。
content:
Using the uploaded reference photo as the subject, generate Image 3 of 5 for a Xiaohongshu (小红书) personal color analysis series.

## INTERNAL ANALYSIS (inherit from Image 1 logic)
Diagnose the same Personal Color Season as Images 1 & 2. Use the season to determine precise makeup colors, hair colors, and accessory recommendations.
⚠️ STRICT RULE: Makeup shades, hair colors, and metal tones must ALL derive from the diagnosed season. Do NOT default to warm/milk-tea/warm-brown tones unless season diagnosis explicitly requires warm undertones. Give descriptive color names that are shoppable and concrete (e.g., 「玫瑰裸粉」not just 「粉色」; 「冷棕灰」not just 「棕色」).

## VISUAL STYLE
- Same background color family as Images 1 & 2 (series visual consistency)
- Same rounded card style, Chinese-primary typography
- 小红书 beauty/lifestyle vibe: practical, reference-ready, aspirational
- Layout: portrait 3:4

## LAYOUT (portrait 3:4)

── HEADER ──
Pill tag: 「💄 妆容 & 发色 & 配饰」in accent color
Subheader: 「这些单品和色调会让你更出彩」

── MAKEUP SECTION ──
Title: 「妆容推荐」
Divided into 3 sub-blocks:

  LIP / 唇色:
  • 2-3 face close-up thumbnails showing subject with different lip colors
  • Each labeled with concrete color name in Chinese (e.g., 「玫瑰裸粉」「雾霾豆沙」「冷调正红」)
  • Below each: ✓ or brief note on why this shade works
  
  BLUSH + EYE / 腮红 + 眼妆:
  • 2 face thumbnails showing different blush+eye combinations
  • Color swatches (small circles) next to each with Chinese name
  • Eye shadow direction: natural/defined, season-appropriate color family
  
  FOUNDATION UNDERTONE / 粉底建议:
  • 1 short recommendation line: 「建议选 [冷/暖/中性] 调粉底，[N/C/W] 系列」
  • Brief Chinese explanation of why

── HAIR COLOR SECTION ──
Title: 「发色推荐 ✨」
3-4 hair color swatches (horizontal strips or large circles)
Each swatch: fill with season-accurate hair color
Label: concrete Chinese color name (e.g., 「冷灰棕」「樱花粉棕」「深酒红」「自然黑棕」)
Below each: 1-line Chinese note (e.g., 「提亮肤色，显白显气质」)
1 small section: 「避开这些发色 ❌」with 1-2 wrong-tone swatches labeled (e.g., 「暖橙棕 — 显黄暗」)

── ACCESSORIES SECTION ──
Title: 「配饰 & 金属色」
2-column layout:
  Left — METAL TONE / 金属色:
    2 face thumbnails with earrings: gold vs silver (or rose gold vs platinum)
    Label which metal tone is more flattering and why (Chinese, brief)
  Right — STYLE DIRECTION / 饰品风格:
    3-4 accessory style tags as pill labels (e.g., 「细链条感」「珍珠系」「冷金属」「自然石感」)
    1-2 small illustrative product thumbnails

── BOTTOM ──
Small footer: 「色号描述仅供参考，建议到店试色 · 图片由 AI 生成」

## QUALITY REQUIREMENTS
- Subject's exact face from reference photo in all makeup thumbnails
- Makeup colors strictly season-derived — concrete, shoppable color name descriptions
- Hair colors: at least 3 distinct tones shown, season-accurate
- Metal tone recommendation clearly stated (gold/silver/rose gold based on undertone)
- All Chinese text correct, no garbled characters
- GPT Image 2, maximum quality, 3:4 portrait format
- Visually consistent with Images 1 & 2 (same series aesthetic)

title: 【图4】发型方向推荐 / Hairstyle Direction
description: 五连图第四张。展示 3-4 款适合该用户的发型方向 + 1-2 款避雷发型。不是 Before/After 改造报告，是'适合你的发型风格'轻量推荐卡。发色从诊断季节动态派生。小红书轻松风格。
content:
Using the uploaded reference photo as the subject, generate Image 4 of 5 for a Xiaohongshu (小红书) personal image series.

## INTERNAL ANALYSIS (inherit from Images 1-3 logic)
Diagnose the same Personal Color Season. Use season to inform hair color recommendations.
Analyze the subject's face shape and natural hair texture to determine flattering hairstyle directions.
⚠️ Key distinction: This is NOT a Before/After transformation report. This is a '适合你的发型方向' (What suits you) guide. Tone is encouraging and directional, not analytical/critical.
⚠️ Hair colors must derive from diagnosed season — do NOT default to warm/brown.

## VISUAL STYLE
- Same background color family as Images 1-3 (series visual consistency)
- Same rounded card style, Chinese-primary typography
- 小红书 lifestyle vibe: aspirational, warm, achievable
- Layout: portrait 3:4

## LAYOUT (portrait 3:4)

── HEADER ──
Pill tag: 「✂️ 发型推荐」in accent color
Subheader: 「找到适合你的发型方向」

── RECOMMENDED HAIRSTYLES ──
Title: 「✅ 这些发型更适合你」
3-4 portrait panels in a 2×2 or column grid
Each panel:
  • Subject's exact face with a different styled hairstyle (realistic rendering)
  • Hairstyle direction name in Chinese (e.g., 「轻盈颈侧层次剪」「韩系膜刺」「空气感中长」「彼岸还是短发」)
  • 1-line Chinese note on why it suits her (face shape + natural texture)
  • Season-appropriate hair color shown (e.g., 「冷灰棕」「深酒红」, NOT warm/caramel unless season requires)

── AVOID SECTION ──
Title: 「❌ 这些方向会弱化优势」
1-2 panels showing hairstyles that don't flatter her face shape
Brief Chinese note (e.g., 「二分缝会加大脸宽感」), light and non-critical tone

── HAIR COLOR MINI STRIP ──
Title: 「发色快选 ✨」
4-5 hair color swatches in horizontal row, season-derived
Each: fill with specific hair color + Chinese name below (e.g., 「冷灰棕」「深红棕」「自然黑棕」)
One labeled 「避开 ❌」with a color clashing with her season

── BOTTOM ──
Small footer: 「发型建议仅供参考，具体轮廓请面询剪子 · 图片由 AI 生成」

## QUALITY REQUIREMENTS
- Subject's exact face from reference photo in ALL hairstyle panels
- Hairstyle directions realistic, achievable, Korean/Japanese casual-chic (NOT dramatic/theatrical)
- Hair colors season-derived, NOT defaulting to warm/brown
- Same series visual aesthetic as Images 1-3
- Chinese text correct, no garbled characters
- GPT Image 2, maximum quality, 3:4 portrait format

title: 【图5】五官优化方向 / Feature Highlights
description: 五连图第五张。小红书'小拇天赋'赋能风格：高光天然优势五官 + 建议强调方向。这是'你的加分项是什么'，不是'缺陷在哪里'。正向鼓励框架，杜绝医美/整容语言。面向普通女生，让用户感到被看见和鼓励。
content:
Using the uploaded reference photo as the subject, generate Image 5 of 5 for a Xiaohongshu (小红书) personal image series.

## INTERNAL ANALYSIS (inherit from Images 1-4 logic)
Analyze the subject's natural facial features to identify genuine strengths and enhancement directions.
⚠️ CRITICAL FRAMING RULE: This is a POSITIVE empowerment card, NOT a defect/medical analysis.
Frame everything as:
  • '你的加分项是...' (Your strengths are...)
  • '建议强调...' (Suggest highlighting...)
  • '天生优势是...' (Natural advantage is...)
NEVER use: defect analysis, 缺陷, 问题, 修复, 整容, 局限性, or clinical improvement framing.

## VISUAL STYLE
- Same background color family as Images 1-4 (series visual consistency)
- Same rounded card style, Chinese-primary typography
- Warm, confident, empowering vibe
- Layout: portrait 3:4

## LAYOUT (portrait 3:4)

── HEADER ──
Pill tag: 「✨ 你的五官优势」in accent color
Subheader: 「你天父天打的加分项」

── HERO PORTRAIT WITH ANNOTATIONS ──
Subject's face portrait, centered, exact likeness from reference photo, soft natural lighting
Surrounded by 4-5 feature annotation arrows pointing to specific facial features
Each arrow: feature name + strength descriptor in Chinese
  Examples: 「眼形」→「杯形大眼，深邃感天生」/ 「唇形」→「饱满唇峰，轮廓分明」/ 「脸型轮廓」→「线条柔和，亲和力强」

── FEATURE STRENGTH CARDS ──
Title: 「你的天生光环 ✨」
4-5 feature cards in 2-column or row layout
Each card:
  • Feature icon or small face thumbnail focusing on that feature
  • Feature name in Chinese (e.g., 「眼形」「唇形」「脸型轮廓」「皮肤质地」「眼距比例」)
  • Strength description: 1 line positive Chinese text
  • Enhancement direction: 「建议强调...」+ specific makeup/styling tip (season-linked)
    Example: 「建议强调眼尾，用季节适合的烟熏棕加深轮廓感」

── HIGHLIGHT DIRECTION STRIP ──
Title: 「如何让这些优势更闪光 ✨」
3 horizontal action tips, each with an icon:
  1. 眼妆方向：[season-specific eye tip]
  2. 唇色强调：[season-specific lip tip]
  3. 修容技巧：[face-feature-specific contouring, framed as 'enhance' not 'fix']

── AFFIRMATION ──
Short uplifting Chinese sentence (1 line, slightly larger italic-style font)
Examples: 「天生美貌，尾扩辅加」 / 「你是己的最好底本」 / 「优化的目的是让你更像自己」

── BOTTOM ──
Small footer: 「本卡为 AI 形象建议，仅供参考，快去让自己闪光」

## QUALITY REQUIREMENTS
- Subject's exact face from reference photo, natural and unaltered (no beautification/slimming)
- All text empowering and positive — zero clinical/defect language
- Enhancement tips season-linked (cool undertone season → cool eyeshadow recommendation)
- Same series visual aesthetic as Images 1-4
- Chinese text correct, no garbled characters
- GPT Image 2, maximum quality, 3:4 portrait format
- Series closer: leave the user feeling seen, celebrated, and inspired
